_comment: Synthetic detection sets (one photo each) for the scoring check. Each case is a list of detections {label, confidence, box:[x1,y1,x2,y2] normalized, sev:0..1}. Run through BOTH the browser scorer (frontend/scripts/cv-scoring-run.mjs -> conditionFromDetections) and the backend scorer (eval/cv_scoring.py -> aggregation_agent.aggregate); the two must agree within tolerance, and each must land in its expected band. This is the regression guard for 'a crushed side must not score as minor cosmetic'.
